            log_entry (dict): Validated feedback data with timestamp
        """
        max_retries = 3
        for attempt in range(max_retries):
            try:
                # Using parameterized query to prevent SQL injection
                query = """
                    INSERT INTO user_feedback
                    (timestamp, user_id, rating, comments, feature_used, processed)
                    VALUES (%(timestamp)s, %(user_id)s, %(rating)s, %(comments)s,
                            %(feature_used)s, %(processed)s)
                """
                self.db.execute(query, log_entry)
                break
            except Exception as e:
                if attempt == max_retries - 1:
                    self._logger.error(f"Failed to save feedback after {max_retries} attempts: {str(e)}")
                    # TODO: Implement fallback to file-based logging when DB fails
                    raise
                time.sleep(1 * (attempt + 1))  # Exponential backoff would be better
